message:
refactor: complete FrankenSQLite migration — remove sqlmodel-sqlite/libsqlite3-sys

Eliminates the last dependency on C SQLite (libsqlite3-sys) and the
sqlmodel-sqlite wrapper. The entire stack now runs on FrankenSQLite
exclusively, from the CLI through the DB pool to share/snapshot export.

Dependency changes (Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock):
- Remove libsqlite3-sys from [workspace.dependencies]
- Remove sqlmodel-sqlite from workspace deps and [patch.crates-io]
- Remove mcp-agent-mail-cli dependency on libsqlite3-sys
- Remove mcp-agent-mail-db dependencies on rusqlite, libsqlite3-sys,
  and raw SQLite bindings
- Add mcp_agent_mail_core dependency on fsqlite for DbConn re-export

DB layer (mcp-agent-mail-db):
- pool.rs: Pre-compute cache_key and init_gate_key at construction to
  avoid repeated hashing; add storage_root() accessor; add
  retire_runtime_state_after_recovery() for pool eviction after schema
  recovery; extract run_specific_migrations() helper
- schema.rs: Rewrite migration_statement_already_satisfied to preflight
  ADD COLUMN migrations against current schema; add
  schema_migrations_runtime_canonical_followup() for post-recovery
  migration sequence; update docstring for migration filtering rationale
- queries.rs, reconstruct.rs, search_service.rs, search_v3.rs, sync.rs:
  Update imports and connection types for FrankenSQLite API

CLI (mcp-agent-mail-cli):
- Add four hidden tooling subcommands: db-query, db-exec, db-backup,
  db-init — FrankenSQLite-backed helpers that the installer and test
  harnesses use instead of shelling out to sqlite3(1)
- Rewrite test_db binary as a sqlite3-compatible CLI supporting .tables,
  .schema, .backup, .timeout, SQL execution, and stdin piping — all
  backed by FrankenSQLite for consistency with the production stack
- Replace all SqliteConnection references with DbConn/CanonicalDbConn
  in health-check and cleanup paths

Share module (mcp-agent-mail-share):
- finalize.rs: Replace SqliteConnection with DbConn; rewrite
  recipients subquery as a pre-joined materialized-view-safe expression
  using a LEFT JOIN + GROUP BY subquery instead of a correlated scalar
  subselect (avoids FrankenSQLite's correlated subquery limitations)
- snapshot.rs: Switch all connection opens and query paths to DbConn
- bundle.rs, deploy.rs, scope.rs, scrub.rs, static_render.rs:
  Update import paths

Server (mcp-agent-mail-server):
- startup_checks.rs: Replace sqlmodel-sqlite cleanup probe with DbConn
- console.rs, lib.rs: Update connection type imports

README.md: Update DATABASE_URL example (sqlite:// not sqlite+aiosqlite://)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 dependencies = [

@@ -887,7 +887,7 @@ All configuration via environment variables. The server reads them at startup vi
 | `HTTP_PORT` | `8765` | Bind port |
 | `HTTP_PATH` | `/mcp/` | MCP base path |
 | `HTTP_BEARER_TOKEN` | (from `.env` file) | Auth token |
-| `DATABASE_URL` | `sqlite+aiosqlite:///./storage.sqlite3` | SQLite connection URL (relative to working directory) |
+| `DATABASE_URL` | `sqlite:///./storage.sqlite3` | SQLite connection URL (relative to working directory) |
 | `STORAGE_ROOT` | XDG-aware (see below) | Archive root directory |
 | `ALLOW_EPHEMERAL_PROJECTS_IN_DEFAULT_STORAGE` | `false` | Permit `/tmp`-style project roots in the default global mailbox archive. Prefer a per-run `STORAGE_ROOT` instead. |
 | `LOG_LEVEL` | `info` | Minimum log level |

@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ shellexpand = "3"
 sha1.workspace = true
 fs2.workspace = true
 globset.workspace = true
+sqlmodel-frankensqlite.workspace = true
 
 [features]
 # Optional local filesystem probes for installed coding-agent CLIs.

@@ -53,9 +53,6 @@ indexmap.workspace = true
 # Async runtime
 asupersync.workspace = true
 
-[target.'cfg(windows)'.dependencies]
-libsqlite3-sys = { workspace = true, features = ["bundled-windows"] }
-
 [features]
 default = ["hybrid", "s3fifo", "tantivy-engine"]
 # Portable build: everything except hybrid/fastembed (avoids ONNX Runtime AVX2 SIGILL

@@ -100,20 +100,10 @@ fn make_pool() -> (DbPool, tempfile::TempDir) {
         .path()
         .join(format!("query_integ_{}.db", unique_suffix()));
 
-    // Pre-initialize the DB file using canonical SQLite (NOT FrankenSQLite) and
-    // run base migrations. This avoids the br-2em1l hang:
-    //
-    // 1. FrankenSQLite files are NOT file-compatible with C SQLite, so the pool
-    //    factory's `recover_sqlite_file` health probes (which use C SQLite)
-    //    would report the file as corrupt.
-    // 2. When storage_root exists with projects, `recover_sqlite_file` attempts
-    //    Git archive reconstruction for "corrupt" (actually Franken-format) files,
-    //    which blocks the thread indefinitely.
-    //
-    // Using canonical SqliteConnection + running migrations here creates a file
-    // that passes C SQLite health probes and has the full schema.
-    let init_conn = sqlmodel_sqlite::SqliteConnection::open_file(db_path.display().to_string())
-        .expect("open canonical connection for test pool");
+    // Pre-initialize the DB file with the same FrankenSQLite connection type the
+    // pool uses at runtime, then run base migrations before constructing the pool.
+    let init_conn = mcp_agent_mail_db::DbConn::open_file(&db_path.display().to_string())
+        .expect("open connection for test pool");
     init_conn
         .execute_raw(mcp_agent_mail_db::schema::PRAGMA_DB_INIT_BASE_SQL)
         .expect("apply init PRAGMAs");

@@ -10623,15 +10623,10 @@ fn readiness_check_semantic_status(
         .into_iter()
         .filter_map(|row| row.get_named::<String>("name").ok())
         .collect::<std::collections::BTreeSet<_>>();
-    let missing_tables = [
-        "projects",
-        "agents",
-        "messages",
-        "message_recipients",
-    ]
-    .into_iter()
-    .filter(|name| !present.contains(*name))
-    .collect::<Vec<_>>();
+    let missing_tables = ["projects", "agents", "messages", "message_recipients"]
+        .into_iter()
+        .filter(|name| !present.contains(*name))
+        .collect::<Vec<_>>();
     if !missing_tables.is_empty() {
         return Err(format!(
             "sqlite schema missing required readiness tables: {}",

@@ -23,11 +23,10 @@ include_dir.workspace = true
 atty.workspace = true
 mcp-agent-mail-db = { workspace = true, default-features = false }
 sqlmodel-core.workspace = true
-sqlmodel-sqlite.workspace = true
+tempfile.workspace = true
 
 [features]
 default = ["mcp-agent-mail-db/default"]
 portable = ["mcp-agent-mail-db/portable"]
 
 [dev-dependencies]
-tempfile.workspace = true
